chunks.text: Technical Reports - Andrew R. Neureuther. Differential methods in phase imaging for optical lithography (EECS-2018-160) by Aamod Shanker and Antoine Wojdyla. Defocus based phase imaging for quantifying electromagnetic edge effects in photomasks (EECS-2014-105) by Aamod Shanker. Measurement and characterization of EUV mask performance at high-NA (EECS-2013-56) by Rikon Chao.
chunks.question: What are the titles of Andrew Neureuther's technical reports from 2013 to 2018?
chunks.answer: Phase imaging and EUV mask studies.

chunks.text: Compensation for Lithography Induced Process Variations during Physical Design (EECS-2011-36) by Eric Chin. Newmark, K. Toh, P. Flanner and Andrew R. Neureuther.
chunks.question: What topics do the 2008-2011 technical reports cover?

chunks.text: White Paper Concurrent Circuit Design/ Process Engineering in a Flexible Manufacturing Environment (M93/91) by Andrew R. Neureuther, Costas J. Spanos, M. Hatzilambrou and C. Yu. Neureuther, William G. Oldham, R.C. Anderson, D.M. Drako, W.E. Haller, B. Huynh, D.E. Lyons, G.R. Misium, D.P. Sutija, K.K.H. Toh and B. Uathavikul.

chunks.answer: Circuit design and lithography test structures.

chunks.answer: CMOS processes and lithography test structures.
